html:
Exclusive to:  

Lobster Bisque was a Crock Pot recipe introduced to Don't Starve Together in Return of Them. It is made from Wobster and Ice. Since the Crock Pot will not accept Dead Wobster or Delicious Wobster, a living Wobster must be used.

Lobster Bisque restores 60 Health, 25 Hunger, and 10 Sanity.

Recipe

×2

Examples

×2

 A recipe for Lobster Bisque that extends hunger value

×2

×2

Trivia

  • Bisque is a smooth and creamy soup that is French in origin, and is typically made from lobster, crab, shrimp, or crayfish. Bisque is also highly seasoned.
  • Lobster Bisque was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
  • Despite Winona's examine text for Lobster Bisque, it isn't a Warly-exclusive food.
  • Woodie's quote for the dish in DST is changed to "Looks so smooth and creamy, but I'd still prefer salmon." as his original quote referred to the setting of Shipwrecked.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord

“Could use more salt, but that's none of my bisque-ness.”
–Wilson

–Willow

–Webber

–Warly
“Still snappy?”
–Wormwood
“Hey Warly? Can you just keep makin' this forever?”

–Wortox
“Glurgh... what in this?”
–Wurt
“It's tasty, I like it!”
–Walter
“Would it be a frivolous use of time travel to go back and eat it over and over again?”
–Wanda
Lobster Bisque was a Crock Pot recipe introduced to Don't Starve Together in Return of Them. It is made from Wobster and Ice. Since the Crock Pot will not accept Dead Wobster or Delicious Wobster, a living Wobster must be used.
Lobster Bisque restores 60 Health, 25 Hunger, and 10 Sanity.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Bisque is a smooth and creamy soup that is French in origin, and is typically made from lobster, crab, shrimp, or crayfish. Bisque is also highly seasoned.
Lobster Bisque was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
Despite Winona's examine text for Lobster Bisque, it isn't a Warly-exclusive food.
Woodie's quote for the dish in DST is changed to "Looks so smooth and creamy, but I'd still prefer salmon." as his original quote referred to the setting of Shipwrecked.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tôm Hùm Bisque là một công thức Nồi Hầm được giới thiệu trong Don't Starve Together trong Return of Them. Nó được làm từ Wobster và Ice. Vì Nồi Hầm sẽ không chấp nhận Wobster Chết hoặc Wobster Ngon, nên phải sử dụng Wobster sống.

'''Lobster Bisque''' was a [[Crock Pot]] recipe introduced to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is made from [[Wobster/DST|Wobster]] and [[Ice]]. Since the Crock Pot will not accept [[Wobster/DST#Dead Wobster|Dead Wobster]] or [[Wobster/DST#Delicious Wobster|Delicious Wobster]], a living Wobster must be used.

Lobster Bisque restores 60 [[Health]], 25 [[Hunger]], and 10 [[Sanity]]. 

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Wobster (DST)
|item2 = Ices
|item3 = Filler
|count3 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Lobster Bisque
}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Bisque is a smooth and creamy soup that is French in origin, and is typically made from lobster, crab, shrimp, or crayfish. Bisque is also highly seasoned.
* Lobster Bisque was introduced to ''Don't Starve Together'' in the ''[[Return of Them#She Sells Sea Shells|She Sells Sea Shells]]'' update.
* Despite Winona's examine text for Lobster Bisque, it isn't a Warly-exclusive food.
* Woodie's quote for the dish in DST is changed to ''"Looks so smooth and creamy, but I'd still prefer salmon."'' as his original quote referred to the setting of ''Shipwrecked.''
